title: Your New Year's Resolution For 2023: Invest $10,000 In These 10 Stocks
text: In this article, I review the stocks of ten world-class companies that I either have in my portfolio or am in the process of building a position in. I point out the specifics of the companies' business models, discuss their profitability and balance sheet quality, and evaluate their dividend growth record and future prospects.

title: T. Rowe Price And Franklin Resources: Obsolete Businesses Or Ripe For A Rebound In 2023?
text: Active asset managers are suffering from strong competition from passive asset managers. In addition, the ongoing bear market led to a double-digit decline in assets under management for most managers. In this article, I provide an update to my investment thesis in TROW and BEN, two $1 trillion+ active asset managers that I last reported on in April 2022.

title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For January 2023
text: NOBL gained 7.12% in November, which brings the Fund's return for the year to a loss of 2.14%. Thus far this month, through December 23rd, the dividend aristocrat ETF is down 3.47%, bringing its year-to-date return to -5.86%.

title: T. Rowe Price: The Market Will Not Drop Indefinitely
text: Price decreases in the stock market will continue until 2023 due to the inverted yield curve and low earnings yield of the S&P 500. The company's third-quarter results were mixed, as it continued to see a slowdown in investment advising fees and a decline in assets under management.

title: T. Rowe Price: High-Yield And Strong Dividend Growth
text: TROW shares have paid the price in 2022 as the greater market has sold off. Shares of TROW are unique in the fact that they offer a high-yield and strong dividend growth.

title: T. Rowe Price: A 4.4% Yielding Dividend Growth Christmas Present For 2023
text: T. Rowe Price has had a rough year in 2022 with shares down over 40% YTD. Despite a weaker environment this year, the margin profile has remained attractive and the balance sheet is still rock solid. AUM has also been increasing over the last couple months.

title: Here's Why T. Rowe Price Can Keep Raising Its Dividend
text: The asset manager has raised its dividend for 36 straight years and counting.
